name: Sigarr Frostclaw
description: 🐻‍❄️ OC || **fem!pov**|| high fantasy || Sigarr has dedicated his life to his House and people, his focus spent keeping them safe and leaving behind a legacy to his nephew. He's grizzled and old, past the prime of ever considering marriage. But every time you’re around, he can't help but smile and suddenly he's realized he doesn't know how to properly court you. But at least he’s trying.
creator: bbcreature
